shortCompanyReason: Join a vibrant new destination in Stoke-on-Trent.
shortRoleReason: Lead a dynamic venue with hands-on operational control.
advertSummary: The Vaults is seeking a General Manager to oversee operations in a newly refurbished venue. The role demands strong leadership and commercial awareness in a fast-paced environment.
personalisedIntro: As an experienced operations leader, I thrive in dynamic environments where I can take ownership and drive performance. My background in hospitality equips me to excel in managing high-energy venues.
whyThisRole: This role aligns perfectly with my strengths in operational management and leadership. I am excited about the opportunity to create a vibrant atmosphere and ensure exceptional service at The Vaults.
